movie.title: Odela Railway Station (2022) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Telugu] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: A string of murders terrorise the people of Odela village, and every newly wed girl in the village is the murder’s target. A bright young police officer is determined to find the culprit and stop the next murder from happening while anxious villagers await closure. But, unfortunately, everyone’s a suspect, and the clock is ticking.
